title: CrabMTR Transit+
description: CrabCity Server Official Mod, added a lot of addons of MTR!

> If you have an issue, please report it at [Github Issue Page](https://github.com/RedsXi/ctplus/issues) 

# CrabMTR Transit+

## Summary
A mod that add some features into MTR.

## The content of the mod
More Ticket barriers


### Ticket Barrier (Pay directly)
Deduct your balance when you pass the barrier!
(If you want to change the cost of the barrier, please use /setPassCost <x> <y> <z> <cost>)

Pictures:

![Barrier](https://redsxi.github.io/CrabGC-s-Extension-of-MTR/screenshots/2023-07-16_01.18.30.png)

![Passing](https://redsxi.github.io/CrabGC-s-Extension-of-MTR/screenshots/2023-07-16_01.18.32.png)

### Single Journey Ticket  

![Single Journey Ticket](https://fe-static.crabapi.cn/xianzhoutongjian/editor/user_uploads/650ef942e24a0c4d6d0be39f/1705122401_9e5ad217-62a8-457e-8a7f-91938ec10ac2)
Just a ticket.    
It will prevent MTR's ticket system to charge your balance when holding.    
Hold in your hand when passing barriers to use it.     It will be recycled after exiting the exit barriers.
